hero.headline: Turn your data into revenue with AI scoring
hero.subheadline: Know exactly who to target, when, and why.

problem.title: You're losing opportunities every day
problem.card1Text: Too many leads, no way to know which ones matter most.
problem.card2Text: Sales teams spend hours chasing prospects that will never convert.
problem.card3Text: Marketing can't see what's actually driving conversions.

solution.title: Score what matters
solution.text: Scorejam analyzes your data in real-time and tells you exactly where to focus — so every action drives revenue.
solution.punchline: You're not just collecting answers. You're truly understanding.

useCases.title: Built for your team
useCases.salesText: Prioritize leads by conversion probability. Stop wasting time on dead ends.
useCases.salesBullet1: Lead scoring based on real behavior
useCases.marketingText: Understand which campaigns and channels drive actual revenue.
useCases.saasText: Identify at-risk accounts and expansion opportunities before it's too late.
useCases.ecommerceText: Score customers by lifetime value and target your best segments.

differentiation.title: Why Scorejam
differentiation.item1Text: Scores update as your data changes. No batch processing, no delays.
differentiation.item2Text: Built from the ground up with machine learning — not bolted on.
differentiation.item3Text: No setup headaches. Connect your data and get insights in minutes.

testimonials.title: What our users say
testimonials.quote1: Scorejam completely changed how we prioritize leads. We finally focus on what actually converts.
testimonials.quote2: Setup took 10 minutes. The insights we got in the first week were worth months of manual analysis.
testimonials.quote3: We reduced our sales cycle by 35% simply by scoring prospects with Scorejam. Game changer.

finalCta.title: Start focusing on what matters
finalCta.subtitle: Join the teams that stopped guessing and started scoring.

signup.headline: Get started in minutes. Get your first insights immediately.
signup.subtext: No complex setup needed. Scorejam guides you to ask the right questions and quickly understand what matters.
signup.testimonial: We finally have answers we can actually use.
signup.securityNote: Your data is secure. No spam.
signup.seeResults: You'll see your first results in less than 5 minutes

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Scale when you're ready.
pricing.proDesc: For teams that need real results
pricing.creditsSubtitle: Boost your usage with credit packs
pricing.howCreditsText: Each scoring analysis uses credits. A simple questionnaire uses ~5 credits. A detailed diagnostic uses ~20 credits. Credits never expire.
pricing.valueItem1Text: Stop guessing. Know exactly where to focus.
pricing.valueItem2Text: From data to decisions in minutes, not weeks.
pricing.projectionTitle: What can you do with credits?
pricing.projectionItem3: Unlimited = score everything, all the time
pricing.faq1Q: Can I try Scorejam for free?
pricing.faq1A: Yes! The Starter plan is completely free with 50 credits per month. No credit card required.
pricing.faq2Q: What happens when I run out of credits?
pricing.faq2A: You can purchase additional credit packs anytime, or upgrade to Pro for more monthly credits.
pricing.faq3A: Absolutely. No commitment, no hidden fees. Cancel your Pro subscription anytime.
pricing.faq4A: Monthly credits reset each billing cycle, but purchased credit packs never expire.
pricing.faq5A: No. Zero setup fee, zero complexity. You're up and running in 10 minutes.
